label: CXL switch-pool calibration (measured-style numbers, not a fak hardware run)
_comment: Only the tiers/fields you measured need be present; every other tier keeps its
representative default. The numbers below stand in for a coherent, switch-pooled
CXL.mem expander shared across a pod (order-of-magnitude, public-spec style); replace
them with YOUR fabric's measured latency / bandwidth / capacity / host count. This
remains a deterministic COST MODEL over the supplied profiles — fak moves no bytes and
this is not a measurement of fak on any particular hardware.
TierProfile fields: ReadLatencyNanos, BandwidthMBPerSec, CapacityBytes, ByteAddressable,
